build_sh_sanitizer:
set -e
mkdir -p build-asan-1913 && cd build-asan-1913
cmake .. -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=clang -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=clang++ -DLLAMA_SANITIZE_ADDRESS=ON -DLLAMA_SANITIZE_UNDEFINED=ON -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DLLAMA_BUILD_TESTS=OFF -DLLAMA_BUILD_SERVER=OFF
cmake --build . --target llama -j$(nproc)
mkdir -p bin
cd ..
clang++ -fsanitize=address,undefined,vptr -g -O0 -I. ${POC_DIR}/harness_gguf_load.c build-asan-1913/libllama.a -lpthread -o build-asan-1913/bin/harness_gguf_load_t1913
build_sh_cov:
set -e
mkdir -p build-cov-1913 && cd build-cov-1913
cmake .. -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=clang -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER=clang++ -DCMAKE_C_FLAGS='-fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping' -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS='-fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping' -DCMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS='-fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping' -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DLLAMA_BUILD_TESTS=OFF -DLLAMA_BUILD_SERVER=OFF
cmake --build . --target llama -j$(nproc)
mkdir -p bin
cd ..
clang++ -fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping -g -O0 -I. ${POC_DIR}/harness_gguf_load.c -L build-cov-1913 -lllama -Wl,-rpath,$PWD/build-cov-1913 -lpthread -o build-cov-1913/bin/harness_gguf_load_t1913
